# SVG Dashboard Widget Manifest — Data Security Events Analysis
#
# This file defines the layout and data mapping for generating an SVG dashboard
# from a completed Data Security Events analysis report. It is consumed by the
# shared SVG rendering skill at .github/skills/svg-dashboard/SKILL.md
#
# Usage:  After generating a DataSecurityEvents analysis report, ask:
#           "Generate an SVG dashboard from the report"
#         Copilot will read this manifest + the report data + the skill,
#         then produce a single SVG file in reports/data-security/.
#
# Customization:  Tweak rows, reorder widgets, add/remove items, change colors.
#                 The renderer adapts to whatever is defined here.

# ─── Canvas ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
canvas:
  width: 1400
  height: 1200          # 5 rows, 12 widgets — dense data security report
  background: "#0d1117"
  padding: 30
  row_gap: 20
  col_gap: 20
  font_family: "Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif"

# ─── Color Palette ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
palette:
  primary: "#409AE1"      # blue   — KPI highlights, primary data
  secondary: "#b4a0ff"    # purple — secondary charts
  accent: "#FFC83D"       # yellow — warnings, Copilot events
  danger: "#EF6950"       # red    — critical findings, exfiltration
  success: "#40C5AF"      # green  — clean/healthy metrics
  muted: "#b2b2b2"        # gray   — labels, axis text
  card_bg: "#161b22"      # dark card background
  card_border: "#30363d"  # subtle border
  text_primary: "#e6edf3"
  text_secondary: "#b2b2b2"

# ─── Risk Rating Colors ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
risk_rating_colors:
  critical: "#EF6950"     # red    — confirmed exfiltration, compound risk
  high: "#FF8C00"         # orange — mass USB copy, external domain + DLP
  medium: "#FFC83D"       # yellow — high SIT diversity, AI browsing
  low: "#40C5AF"          # green  — DLP-only, limited workloads

# ─── Workload Colors ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
workload_colors:
  copilot: "#FFC83D"        # yellow — dominant workload
  endpoint: "#EF6950"       # red    — file-based risk
  onedrive: "#409AE1"       # blue   — cloud storage
  sharepoint: "#b4a0ff"     # purple — collaboration
  teams: "#40C5AF"          # green  — messaging
  exchange: "#FF8C00"       # orange — email
  other: "#b2b2b2"          # gray   — ConnectedAIApp, DataInsights

# ─── Row Definitions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# TOKEN-BUDGET LAYOUT: 5 rows, 12 widgets, ~1200px height
# Designed for data security analysis reports with SIT/label breakdown,
# workload distribution, risk-ranked users, and recommendations.

rows:

  # ── ROW 1: Title Bar ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  - id: title-bar
    height: 70
    widgets:
      - type: title-banner
        fields:
          title: "Data Security Events Dashboard"
          subtitle_fields:
            - scope                   # e.g. "Tenant-wide — all users and workloads"
            - time_range              # e.g. "2026-02-16 to 2026-03-18 (30 days)"
            - generation_date         # e.g. "2026-03-18"
        style:
          title_align: center
          title_size: 26
          subtitle_size: 13
          accent_color: palette.primary

  # ── ROW 2: Key Metrics KPI Cards ───────────────────────────────────────────
  - id: key-metrics
    height: 150
    widgets:
      - type: kpi-card
        label: "Total Events"
        field: total_events                 # e.g. 810,259
        unit: ""
        icon: "activity"
        highlight_color: palette.primary

      - type: kpi-card
        label: "Users"
        field: total_users                  # e.g. 1,794
        unit: "users"
        icon: "users"
        highlight_color: palette.primary

      - type: kpi-card
        label: "Files"
        field: total_files                  # e.g. 14,860+
        unit: "files"
        icon: "file"
        highlight_color: palette.secondary

      - type: kpi-card
        label: "File Events"
        field: file_events_pct              # e.g. "5.7%"
        unit: ""
        icon: "hard-drive"
        highlight_color: palette.danger

      - type: kpi-card
        label: "Copilot Events"
        field: copilot_events_pct           # e.g. "94.3%"
        unit: ""
        icon: "bot"
        highlight_color: palette.accent

      - type: kpi-card
        label: "Label Coverage"
        field: label_coverage_pct           # e.g. "2.0%"
        unit: ""
        icon: "tag"
        highlight_color: palette.muted

  # ── ROW 3: Top SITs + Workload Breakdown ───────────────────────────────────
  - id: sits-and-workloads
    height: 300
    widgets:
      - type: horizontal-bar-chart
        title: "Top Sensitive Information Types"
        field: top_sits                     # array of {name, events}
        width_pct: 55
        bar_height: 28
        max_items: 8
        value_suffix: ""
        label_field: "name"
        value_field: "events"
        color: palette.primary

      - type: donut-chart
        title: "Workload Distribution"
        field: workload_breakdown           # array of {workload, events}
        width_pct: 45
        show_center_total: true
        segment_colors:
          "Copilot": workload_colors.copilot
          "Endpoint": workload_colors.endpoint
          "OneDrive": workload_colors.onedrive
          "SharePoint": workload_colors.sharepoint
          "MicrosoftTeams": workload_colors.teams
          "Exchange": workload_colors.exchange
          "Other": workload_colors.other

  # ── ROW 4: Risk-Ranked Users + Action Type Breakdown ───────────────────────
  - id: users-and-actions
    height: 300
    widgets:
      - type: table-widget
        title: "File-Based Top Risk Users"
        field: top_risk_users               # array of {user, risk, events, files, actions}
        width_pct: 55
        columns:
          - { header: "User",    field: "user",   width: 25 }
          - { header: "Risk",    field: "risk",   width: 15, badge: true }
          - { header: "Events",  field: "events", width: 15 }
          - { header: "Files",   field: "files",  width: 15 }
          - { header: "Key Actions", field: "actions", width: 30 }
        max_items: 6
        badge_colors:
          "Critical": "#EF6950"
          "High": "#FF8C00"
          "Medium": "#FFC83D"
          "Low": "#40C5AF"

      - type: horizontal-bar-chart
        title: "File Action Types"
        field: file_action_types            # array of {action, events}
        width_pct: 45
        bar_height: 26
        max_items: 8
        value_suffix: ""
        label_field: "action"
        value_field: "events"
        bar_color_map:
          "Files collected and exfiltrated": "#EF6950"
          "File copied to Removable media": "#FF8C00"
          "File deleted on endpoint": "#FF8C00"
          "Generated High severity DLP alerts": "#FFC83D"
        color: palette.primary              # default for unmapped actions

  # ── ROW 5: Assessment + Recommendations ────────────────────────────────────
  - id: assessment-and-recs
    height: 220
    widgets:
      - type: assessment-banner
        title: "Security Assessment"
        field: overall_assessment            # e.g. {level: "critical", detail: "..."}
        width_pct: 40
        severity_field: "level"              # "critical" | "high" | "medium" | "low" | "informational"
        detail_field: "detail"               # 1-2 sentence supporting text
        key_risks_field: "key_risks"         # array of strings — highlighted in danger color
        severity_colors:
          critical: palette.danger
          high: "#FF8C00"
          medium: palette.accent
          low: palette.success
          informational: palette.primary

      - type: recommendation-cards
        title: "Top Recommendations"
        field: recommendations               # array of {priority, text}
        width_pct: 60
        max_items: 3
        priority_colors:
          critical: palette.danger
          high: "#FF8C00"
          medium: palette.accent
          low: palette.primary
          info: palette.muted

# ─── Data Source Mapping ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Maps each widget field to the report section where the data lives.
# The SVG renderer extracts these values from the completed report markdown.
data_sources:
  report_file: "reports/data-security/DataSecurity_Analysis_*.md"
  field_mapping_notes: |
    # Row 1 — Title
    scope: "Report header → Scope field (e.g. 'Tenant-wide — all users and workloads')"
    time_range: "Report header → Time Range field (e.g. '2026-02-16 to 2026-03-18 (30 days)')"
    generation_date: "Report header → Generated field"

    # Row 2 — KPI Cards
    total_events: "Executive Summary → total events count"
    total_users: "Executive Summary → distinct users count"
    total_files: "Executive Summary → distinct files count"
    file_events_pct: "Action Type Breakdown → File-Based Operations percentage"
    copilot_events_pct: "Action Type Breakdown → Copilot Interactions percentage"
    label_coverage_pct: "Sensitivity Labels section → label coverage percentage"

    # Row 3 — SITs + Workloads
    top_sits: "SIT Landscape → Custom/Organization SITs + Built-in Microsoft SITs tables, sorted by Events desc, top 8"
    workload_breakdown: "Workload Breakdown table → workload name and events. Combine ConnectedAIApp + DataInsights into 'Other'"

    # Row 4 — Users + Actions
    top_risk_users: "File-Based Top Users (Risk-Ranked) table → user (short form), risk level, file events, files, key action types (abbreviated)"
    file_action_types: "Action Type Breakdown → File-Based Operations table → action type and event count, top 8"

    # Row 5 — Assessment + Recommendations
    overall_assessment: "Derive from Executive Summary risk findings. Level = highest risk in report (critical if exfiltration confirmed). Key risks from Critical/High findings. Detail = 1-2 sentence synthesis"
    recommendations: "Recommendations table → top 3 items with priority mapped from emoji (🔴=critical/high, 🟠=medium, 🟡=low, 🔵=info)"
